events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flanged joints in progress, wrong gasket type/material for service. This is a sequence/procedure violation - using incorrect gasket material. Decision should be fail. Risk high or critical depending on service. Since it's heavy industrial and wrong gasket for service, could lead to leak - high risk. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage in-progress. Percent complete maybe 50. Need to stop work, remove wrong gasket, install correct gasket per spec, re-torque.

    "Wrong gasket type/material installed for the specified service on flanged joint",
    "Gasket material does not match engineered specification/line service requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on affected flanged joint immediately",
    "Isolate and identify the correct gasket material per drawing/spec and service fluid",
    "Remove the incorrect gasket and inspect flange faces for damage",
    "Install the specified gasket and reassemble per ASME PCC-1 bolting/torque sequence",
    "Document the nonconformance and re-inspect before pressure testing"
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing a gasket with the wrong type/material for the service is a noncompliant assembly that can fail under pressure/temperature or media compatibility, creating a leak hazard. Work cannot continue until the correct gasket is installed and the joint is reassembled and verified per ASME PCC-1 and B16.5 requirements.",
  "references": ["ASME PCC-1", "ASME B16.5"]
}
